login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.

errors.accountLocked: Your account has been locked. Please contact support.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.

signup.title: CREATE A NEW ACCOUNT 🚀
signup.subtitle: Join Modaribok and start your sports journey.
signup.uploadImage: Attach a profile photo (png, jpeg, jpg)
signup.noteText: You can be a store owner, own a gym, and you can be a trainer.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

errors.phoneInUse: This phone number is already in use

logout.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out?

validation.nameNoSymbols: Name must not contain special characters
validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 30 characters
validation.emailFormat: Please enter a valid email address
validation.emailOrPhoneFormat: Please enter a valid email or phone number
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number

forgotPassword.title: FORGOT YOUR PASSWORD? 🔑
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email or phone number and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailPlaceholder: Enter your email or phone number
forgotPassword.successMessageEmail: We sent a password reset link to
forgotPassword.successMessageWhatsapp: We sent a password reset code via WhatsApp to
forgotPassword.successNote: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or try again.

resetPassword.title: RESET YOUR PASSWORD 🔒
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: This password reset link is no longer valid. Please request a new one.
